## Summary

## Mapping changes
- [ ] Added new gene file(s)
- [ ] Updated existing gene file(s)
- [ ] Code or docs change only

## Evidence (for mapping changes)
- [ ] Sequence identity verified
- [ ] Literature PMIDs cited
- [ ] Quality tier assigned (gold/silver/bronze)

## Checklist
- [ ] Schema validation passes locally (`python -m amrxref validate`)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG if user-facing
